name: nowdev-ai-toolbox
description: ServiceNow AI Agents for VS Code Copilot
author: Daniel Aagren Seehartrai Madsen

chatAgents.name: NowDev AI Agent
chatAgents.description: Solution Architecture & Workflow Management for ServiceNow development

chatAgents.name: NowDev-AI-Classic-Developer
chatAgents.description: Classic ServiceNow scripting coordinator — delegates to Script Include, Business Rule, and Client Script specialists

chatAgents.name: NowDev-AI-Release-Expert
chatAgents.description: Update Sets, XML Data & Deployment management

chatAgents.name: NowDev-AI-Fluent-Developer
chatAgents.description: Fluent SDK coordinator — delegates Schema, Logic, Automation, and UI work to Fluent specialists

chatAgents.name: NowDev-AI-Fluent-Schema-Developer
chatAgents.description: Fluent SDK specialist for schema and configuration artifacts — Tables, Roles, ACLs, Properties, Menus, and structural foundation metadata

chatAgents.name: NowDev-AI-Fluent-Logic-Developer
chatAgents.description: Fluent SDK specialist for server-side logic — Business Rules, Script Includes, Script Actions, REST APIs, Email Notifications, and SLAs

chatAgents.name: NowDev-AI-Fluent-Automation-Developer
chatAgents.description: Fluent SDK specialist for workflow automation — Flows, Subflows, custom Action Definitions, and custom Trigger Definitions

chatAgents.name: NowDev-AI-Fluent-UI-Developer
chatAgents.description: Fluent SDK specialist for user-facing artifacts — React UI Pages, Client Scripts, UI Policies, Service Catalog, Service Portal, Workspaces, and Dashboards

chatAgents.name: NowDev-AI-Assistant
chatAgents.description: Lightweight Q&A, brainstorming, quick browser exploration, and early discovery

chatAgents.name: NowDev-AI-Refinement
chatAgents.description: User story refinement and feasibility validation before development begins
